title: Sautéed Norwegian Kale Pilaf
description: A flavorful, vegan-friendly pilaf made with soft Norwegian kale, soffritto base, and a hint of orange blossom water.

ingredients.name: Norwegian kale
ingredients.amount: 1 bunch, stems removed and discarded, leaves torn

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the soffritto mixture to the skillet and cook until it starts to soften, about 5 minutes.
Add the garlic to the skillet and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the torn kale to the skillet and cook until it starts to wilt, about 3 minutes.
Stir in the orange blossom water, lemon juice, and chickpeas. Cook for 1 minute.
Add the white rice to the skillet and stir to combine with the kale mixture.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and cook for 5 minutes.
Season with salt and nutritional yeast to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with additional lemon wedges if desired.
